name: /audit-pack: bundles the Decision Trail section sourced from docs/adr/ MADR registry (W-1 / W-4)
command:
mkdir -p docs/adr && printf '# 0001-choose-cyclonedx
status: accepted
decision_id: 0001
' > docs/adr/2026-04-01-choose-cyclonedx.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --decision-trail-dir "$PWD/docs/adr" --emit "$PWD/audit-pack.md" --section decision-trail && grep -E "Decision Trail|0001" audit-pack.md 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
